pages.title: Consumables
pages.text: From crops and creatures alike, the Void provides a variety of consumables. These items restore hunger and grant effects, though many carry unusual properties.

pages.title: Voidblight Berry
pages.text: A corrupted fruit grown from Void crops. Restores hunger, though its effects may not be entirely safe.

pages.title: Infernal Pepper
pages.text: A sharp and volatile ingredient. Provides stronger effects when consumed.

pages.title: Infernal Jerky
pages.text: Dried meat infused with Infernal energy. A reliable and potent food source.

pages.title: Ethereal Honey Bottle
pages.text: Honey Bottles can be collected from Ethereal Honey Cauldrons or nests once enough nectar has accumulated. This strange liquid contains concentrated energy gathered by Ethereal Bees.

pages.title: Cosmic Nectar
pages.text: An extremely powerful consumable. Grants multiple high-tier effects, but overwhelms the body.
